description: Displays the list of all active commands and modules in the system.

commands.list_capabilities: Displays the complete list of all tools, modules, and capabilities currently loaded in the system.
commands.refresh_registry: Forces a re-read and update of the central capabilities registry (rescans plugins).

function.name: HELP__list_capabilities

function.name: HELP__refresh_registry
function.description: Forces a re-read and update of the central capabilities registry (rescans plugins).
